TechnologyStack.Framework: Nx 20, Next.js 15, Vite 5, React 19, gqlgen 0.17.49, go-telegram/bot 1.20.0

dep.name: @nx/workspace
dep.purpose: Workspace orchestration and target graph

dep.name: @nx-go/nx-go
dep.purpose: Go integration for Nx projects

dep.name: next
dep.purpose: Public web App Router framework

dep.name: vite
dep.purpose: web-admin application bundler and dev server

dep.name: react
dep.purpose: Web UI runtime

dep.name: @tanstack/react-query
dep.purpose: Web data fetching and cache

dep.name: graphql-request
dep.purpose: Typed web-admin GraphQL client transport with browser cookie credentials

dep.name: tailwindcss
dep.purpose: Utility CSS and shadcn theme token pipeline for web-admin and public web

dep.name: @tailwindcss/vite
dep.purpose: Tailwind CSS integration for the Vite web-admin build

dep.name: @tailwindcss/postcss
dep.purpose: Tailwind CSS integration for the Next public web build

dep.name: radix-ui
dep.purpose: Accessible primitive implementation dependency for shadcn web-admin components and independent public web primitives

dep.name: class-variance-authority
dep.purpose: Variant class generation for shadcn-compatible primitives

dep.name: tailwind-merge
dep.purpose: Class conflict resolution for shadcn-compatible UI helpers

dep.name: clsx
dep.purpose: Conditional class composition for shadcn-compatible UI helpers

dep.name: lucide-react
dep.purpose: Icon dependency available only through approved web-admin and public web UI-kit exports

dep.name: tw-animate-css
dep.purpose: Animation utilities imported by shadcn theme CSS in web-admin and public web

dep.name: vitest
dep.purpose: Workspace and web unit coverage runner

dep.name: @vitest/coverage-v8
dep.purpose: V8 coverage provider for 100 percent TypeScript coverage gates

dep.name: @playwright/test
dep.purpose: Full-stack browser and HTTP e2e verification

dep.name: github.com/99designs/gqlgen
dep.purpose: Go GraphQL server generation

dep.name: github.com/go-chi/chi/v5
dep.purpose: API HTTP router

dep.name: github.com/jackc/pgx/v5
dep.purpose: PostgreSQL driver

dep.name: github.com/redis/go-redis/v9
dep.purpose: Redis client for cache and web-admin opaque session storage

dep.name: github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc
dep.purpose: Typed Go query generation for PostgreSQL users and admin_users repository code

dep.name: go.uber.org/zap
dep.purpose: Structured logging

dep.name: github.com/go-telegram/bot
dep.purpose: Telegram bot runtime

constraint.reason: Root scripts and workspace installs use Bun.
Public web app depends on Next.js 15 conventions.
web-admin app depends on Vite conventions.

tool.name: ci-provider
tool.version: GitLab SaaS or compatible self-managed GitLab

tool.name: ci-runner-pool
tool.value: GitLab group runners with Docker executor

PreferredAgentStack.preferred-api-sql-codegen: github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc using pgx/v5 output from goose migrations plus users and admin_users repository query SQL
PreferredAgentStack.preferred-web-data-client: @tanstack/react-query plus REST fetch client for `web`; @tanstack/react-query plus credentialed graphql-request/codegen for `web-admin`

discouraged-surface.reason: Shared schema and codegen already define the API contract.

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit and contract checks close to each module; coverage targets are available for explicit coverage phases rather than required for ordinary active development.

wave-level.focus: Checks merged surfaces touched by schema, API, or web changes without requiring 100 percent coverage unless the current wave is explicitly a coverage phase.

phase-level.focus: Broader regression confidence before release or template handoff; `verify:coverage` is the explicit 100 percent coverage handoff gate.

Testing.active-development-test-policy: During active development, agents run the nearest useful behavior, contract, typecheck, lint, codegen, or e2e checks needed to prove the change. They do not chase 100 percent coverage unless the user explicitly requests it or the task is a coverage-policy, coverage epic, release, or template handoff phase.
Testing.coverage-policy: When the coverage gate is invoked, thresholds are fixed at 100 percent for non-allowlisted Go and TypeScript behavior. Generated files and bootstrap entrypoints must be listed in `tools/coverage/coverage.config.json` with replacement gates.
Testing.e2e-policy: Playwright starts PostgreSQL and Redis through `docker/docker-compose.test.yml`, targets `monorepo_test` on PostgreSQL port `17501` and Redis port `17502`, starts the API on `18080`, seeds the e2e admin through env-backed bootstrap, runs web-admin and web e2e sequentially on the configured browser port, and verifies health, readiness, admin login/session GraphQL CRUD, and public REST browser users flows.
Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer real schema validation, deterministic Go tests, and narrow web test fixtures over broad monkey-patching.

Observability.required-fields: requestId, correlationId where available, stable operation fields
Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, raw tokens, passwords, or raw high-risk payloads.

AutonomyPolicy.replan-trigger: Missing dependency, contradictory contract, generated artifact drift, or unclear third-party surface.
AutonomyPolicy.checkpoint-requirement: Every completed step must emit assumptions, commands, evidence, graph delta, verification delta, and next action.
AutonomyPolicy.file-local-contract-policy: New or meaningfully edited governed source, test, tooling, config, script, CI, Docker, and durable documentation files outside `docs/*.xml` must include current file-local GRACE markup before closeout; shared GRACE XML artifacts are governed by their XML structure directly, and historical unmarked files are backfilled when touched, not by broad sweep.

DeliveryShape.shape: Nx monorepo with Go API app, Go Telegram bot app, Vite GraphQL web-admin app, Next.js App Router REST public web app, shared Go libraries, shared GraphQL schema library, Docker Compose infrastructure, and generated artifacts.
